entry.title: 1486B Eastern Exhibition
entry.content:
Eastern Exhibition

The question

Input & Output

Solve

The very first thing we should know is we are using Manhattan distance to represent the distance of to points, which means we can handle Xs and Ys separately.

for(int i=0; i<n; i++) cin>>x[i]>>y[i];
sort(x.begin(), x.end());
sort(y.begin(), y.end());

If the number of points is odd, there will be only 1 point to make sum of absolute difference of Xs minimum, so does Ys.

Otherwise, any X between two mid Xs has the same sum, so does Ys.

ll cx, cy;
if(x.size()&1) cx=1;
else {
    int mid=x.size()>>1;
    cx=x[mid]-x[mid-1]+1;
}
if(y.size()&1) cy=1;
else {
    int mid=y.size()>>1;
    cy=y[mid]-y[mid-1]+1;
}
cout<<cx*cy<<endl;

Code

#include<bits/stdc++.h>

using namespace std;

const int maxn = 2e5 + 5;
const int inf = INT_MAX;
const int mod = 1e9 + 7;

typedef long long ll;

vector<int> x, y;

int main() {
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    int t;
    cin>>t;
    while(t--){
        int n;
        cin>>n;
        x.resize(n);
        y.resize(n);
        for(int i=0; i<n; i++) cin>>x[i]>>y[i];
        sort(x.begin(), x.end());
        sort(y.begin(), y.end());
        ll cx, cy;
        if(x.size()&1) cx=1;
        else {
            int mid=x.size()>>1;
            cx=x[mid]-x[mid-1]+1;
        }
        if(y.size()&1) cy=1;
        else {
            int mid=y.size()>>1;
            cy=y[mid]-y[mid-1]+1;
        }
        cout<<cx*cy<<endl;
    }

    return 0;
}

entry.title: 1490F Equalize the Array
entry.content:
Equalize the Array

The question

Input & Output

Simplify the question

We’re supposed to delete minimum number of elements to make the given array beautiful, which means every number in the array appears same times

Solve

First, we will save the array to a map. Since we will do a sort, which can’t be done with map, I created a vector of pair

ll a[maxn];
map<ll, int> mp;
vector<pair<int, int>> b;

bool cmp(pair<int, int> x, pair<int, int> y) {
    return x.second > y.second;
}

for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
    cin >> a[i];
    mp[a[i]]++;
}
for (auto it:mp) {
    b.emplace_back(it.first, it.second);
}
sort(b.begin(), b.end(), cmp);

The next step is the key. We sorted the vector with the number of elements in decreasing order.

b[i].second(i+1) means the number of elements will be left, so n-b[i].second(i+1) will be the number of elements we will delete(for this one).

Then we just find the minimum one and output

int ans = inf;
for (int i = 0; i < b.size(); i++) {
    ans = min(ans, n - b[i].second * (i + 1));
}

Code

#include<bits/stdc++.h>

using namespace std;

const int maxn = 2e5 + 5;
const int inf = INT_MAX;
const int mod = 1e9 + 7;

typedef long long ll;

ll a[maxn];
map<ll, int> mp;
vector<pair<int, int>> b;

bool cmp(pair<int, int> x, pair<int, int> y) {
    return x.second > y.second;
}

void solve() {
    int n;
    cin >> n;
    b.clear();
    mp.clear();
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        cin >> a[i];
        mp[a[i]]++;
    }
    for (auto it:mp) {
        b.emplace_back(it.first, it.second);
    }
    sort(b.begin(), b.end(), cmp);
    int ans = inf;
    for (int i = 0; i < b.size(); i++) {
        ans = min(ans, n - b[i].second * (i + 1));
    }
    cout << ans << endl;
}

int main() {
    ios::sync_with_stdio(false);
    int t;
    cin >> t;
    while (t--) {
        solve();
    }

    return 0;
}

entry.title: Tips for interactive problem
entry.content:
Little tips

While solving interactive problems, we should

  1. Let “ask” function do the query
  2. Never forget cout.flush(), even you have used endl

entry.title: bamboo instruction
entry.content:
hexo bamboo特效介绍


标题


{% title h2, 标题内容 %}
{% titleB h2, 标题内容 %}

文字颜色


{% span 文字样式, 文字内容 %}

文字样式包括颜色、大小、是否居中等

tabs


{% tabs tab-id %}

<!-- tab tab1 -->

tab1内容

<!-- endtab -->

<!-- tab tab2 -->

tab内容

<!-- endtab -->

{% endtabs %}

Text文本样式标签演示


{% title h2, Text文本样式标签演示 %}

带 {% u 下划线 %} 的文本

带 {% emp 着重号 %} 的文本

带 {% wavy 波浪线 %} 的文本

带 {% del 删除线 %} 的文本

键盘样式的文本 {% kbd command %} + {% kbd D %}

密码样式的文本：{% psw 这里没有验证码 %}

后续待补充……

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

Create a new post

$ hexo new "My New Post"

More info: Writing

Run server

$ hexo server

More info: Server

Generate static files

$ hexo generate

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

$ hexo deploy

More info: Deployment

entry.title: my first blog
entry.content:
Welcome to Adam's blog

我会在这个博客不停更新各种奇奇怪怪的内容，如果你想找

  1. 题解（ACM菜逼一个）
  2. 游戏攻略（？我tm直接竟有此事）
  3. 考研知识点（考研党路过~）
  4. 奇奇怪怪的软件的安装+配置教程

那你必然没来错地方

为了锻炼大家的英语水平装逼，我会随机抽几个幸运博客用全英文编写，祝大家幸福（？奇奇怪怪的）

entry.title: 高数公式合集
entry.content:
考研高数公式合集

考研的过程中数学公式往往是最难记忆的，特别是当不能通过简单的推理得到答案的时候，所以这里我列出了一些比较难记的公式，方便查看。

参数方程表示的函数求导

如果现在有s

$x=x(t)$
$y=y(t)$

则：

$\frac{dy}{dx}=\frac{\frac{dy}{dt}}{\frac{dx}{dt}}$
$\frac{d^2y}{dx^2}=\frac{\frac{d^2y}{dt^2}\frac{dx}{dt}-\frac{d^2x}{dt^2}\frac{dy}{dt}}{(\frac{dx}{dt})^3}$

$\begin{equation} \sum_{k=1}^{n} \frac{1}{1+8 \sin ^{2} \frac{k \pi}{n}}=\frac{n\left(2^{n}+1\right)}{3\left(2^{n}-1\right)} \end{equation}$
